reviews.comment:
La mejor conservada de todas las que conocimos. Esta decorada con fotos de diferentes epocas de la estacion. Los baños super impecables en su estado original se nota el amor que le ponen los que la concesionan. Patri un libro abierto como guia turistica. Siempre que estemos x la zona pasaremos por ahi! @ruterosxnaturaleza

(Translated by Google)
The best preserved of all the ones we visited. It's decorated with photos from different eras of the station. The bathrooms are spotless in their original condition; you can see the love the concessionaires put into it. Patri is an open book as a tour guide. Whenever we're in the area, we'll stop by! @ruterosxnaturaleza
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13471578260485529773/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXelBUX1RBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Lo único malo o que debería corregirse es el horario de atención que aparece en Google (figura 24hs y resulta que para las 23hs ya está cerrado)

(Translated by Google)
Good service. The only downside, or something that should be corrected, is the opening hours shown on Google (it says 24 hours, but it turns out it's already closed by 11 pm).
